bird.name: Inca dove
bird.summary: The Inca dove or Mexican dove (Columbina inca) is a small New World dove. The species was first described by French surgeon and naturalist…

relations.subject: Inca dove
relations.evidence: This terrestrial species forms flocks in deserts, scrublands and cultivated areas and may also be found in urban settings where they feed upon grass seeds and take advantage of the ready availability of water from agricultural and suburban irrigation
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
